title: Payment
description: The successful capture record. One row per successful money-in event. Carries `tenant_id` only — cascades application/region/organization through the tenant. IMMUTABLE after create — financial records are never mutated, only credit-noted (invoice side) or refunded (refund module side). NEVER carries `application_id`, `region_id`, `organization_id`, `branch_id`, or `scope_node_id`. NEVER carries card PAN, CVV, magnetic stripe, or PIN (PCI-DSS Level 1).

payment_number.description: Sequential per tenant. Format: 'PAY-YYYY-NNNNNNNN'. Generated via PostgreSQL advisory lock — required for accounting compliance.

invoice_id.description: Parent invoice. RESTRICT — invoices carrying payments cannot be hard-deleted until retention expires.

payment_intent_id.description: The succeeded intent that produced this payment. RESTRICT — every Payment row is anchored to its originating intent.

payment_method_id.description: Nullable — some flows (one-time bank transfer, cash-app, invoice-by-mail) create a Payment without a saved PaymentMethod. RESTRICT when set — historical Payments preserve the method reference.

transaction_id.description: The recording double-entry transaction. NULL between Payment insert + TransactionRecorder completion (same DB transaction — the window is microseconds). RESTRICT — transactions bookkept for a payment cannot be hard-deleted until retention expires.

provider.description: Enum: stripe / paddle / adyen / square / paypal / custom_webhook.

provider_reference_id.description: The provider's own charge/transaction identifier. Stripe: ch_..., Paddle: txn_..., Adyen: pspReference. Used for reconciliation + refund dispatch.

amount_cents.description: Total amount captured (including tax). In cents (or smallest denomination — JPY has no fractional unit).

currency.description: ISO 4217 3-letter currency code. Frozen at capture time.

amount_refunded_cents.description: Running total of refunded amount. Managed by the refund module — payment module receives events + updates this counter. Must satisfy amount_refunded_cents <= amount_cents.

amount_disputed_cents.description: Running total of disputed amount. Managed by the payment_disputes lifecycle. Can be higher than amount_cents in edge cases (partial disputes + escalation).

fee_cents.description: Provider fees debited from us (e.g. Stripe's 2.9% + 30¢). Zero when the provider doesn't debit fees at capture time.

net_cents.description: Computed at insert: amount_cents - fee_cents. Denormalised for query-plan efficiency in aggregation reports.

captured_at.description: When the provider marked the payment as captured. May differ from created_at when the provider reports async.

capture_method.description: Enum: automatic / manual. automatic = captured at authorization (default). manual = authorization hold captured later (requires payment_manual_capture entitlement, Medium+).

payment_method_type.description: Enum: card / bank_debit / bank_transfer / wallet / installment / crypto / cash / check. Card is the most common.

payment_method_brand.description: Enum: visa / mastercard / amex / discover / jcb / unionpay / sepa / ach / apple_pay / google_pay / paypal / venmo / cash_app / other. Nullable for non-card methods (bank_transfer, cash).

payment_method_last4.description: Last 4 digits of the card or bank account. NEVER the full PAN (PCI-DSS). Nullable when the method type doesn't have a natural last4 (cash, some wallets).

payment_method_exp_month.description: Card expiry month, 1-12. Nullable for non-card methods.

payment_method_exp_year.description: Card expiry year, 4-digit. Nullable for non-card methods.

ip_address.description: Customer's IP at payment time. Nullable for offline captures (mail-in check, cash-at-counter). Used for fraud correlation + regulatory reporting.

device_fingerprint_hash.description: SHA-256 of the customer's device fingerprint (from Stripe.js / Adyen.js / provider SDK). NEVER raw — the raw fingerprint is PII.

risk_score.description: Provider risk score, 0-100. Nullable — some providers do not report scores. Higher = riskier.

risk_level.description: Enum: low / normal / elevated / highest. Nullable when the provider doesn't report. Fraud module reads for review queues.

three_ds_result.description: Enum: not_attempted / authenticated / rejected / not_supported / bypassed. Nullable for non-card methods.

three_ds_version.description: 3DS version used: '1.0.2', '2.1.0', '2.2.0'. Nullable when 3DS not attempted.

receipt_url.description: Provider-hosted receipt URL. Nullable for providers that don't offer hosted receipts (Adyen).

billing_details_snapshot.description: Frozen at Payment.create. Shape: { name, email, phone, billing_address: { line1, line2?, city, region, postal_code, country_code } }. This is the shipping/billing address at the moment of payment — never mutated after capture (would corrupt the audit trail).

provider_metadata.description: ENCRYPTED AT REST. Full provider response payload for debugging. May contain provider-specific fields (Stripe outcomes, Adyen additionalData). Redacted from support-tool views unless caller holds platform.payment.pii.view.

indexes.name: payments_tenant_number_unique
indexes.description: Sequential numbering per tenant — accounting compliance.

indexes.name: payments_invoice_captured_idx
indexes.description: For per-invoice payment lookup + aging reports (DESC).

indexes.name: payments_provider_reference_idx
indexes.description: For webhook dispatch lookup — the webhook body carries provider_reference_id; we join on it.

indexes.name: payments_intent_unique
indexes.description: One Payment per succeeded PaymentIntent (defense-in-depth — PaymentObserver already enforces).

x-invariants: IMMUTABLE after create — every field except amount_refunded_cents + amount_disputed_cents + updated_at is frozen. Those two accumulate via refund/dispute events only.
amount_refunded_cents <= amount_cents — cannot refund more than we captured
net_cents = amount_cents - fee_cents — computed at insert; never mutated
payment_intent_id references a PaymentIntent with status='succeeded' — enforced by PaymentObserver.creating
one Payment per PaymentIntent — unique index on payment_intent_id
payment_number is unique per tenant + sequential
billing_details_snapshot is frozen at Payment.create — cannot be mutated after
state transitions are NOT applicable — Payment has no status field. Refunds live on payment_refunds (refund module); disputes live on payment_disputes.
hard-deletion is FORBIDDEN — payments retain per financial retention (7y baseline; 10y Enterprise)
device_fingerprint_hash SHA-256 pattern enforced — raw fingerprints prohibited (PII)
payment_method_last4 exactly 4 digits — never the full PAN (PCI-DSS Level 1)
TenantErased cascade is via FK CASCADE, subject to financial-record archival exception (Art. 17 §3)
